pathfinders_eye.title: Pathfinder's Eye
pathfinders_eye.description: +10% movement speed. You move with purpose across every terrain.

scouts_instinct.title: Scout's Instinct
scouts_instinct.description: +25% discovery radius. Your senses reach beyond the horizon.

navigator.title: Navigator
navigator.description: +15% compass and map effective range. No path escapes your notice.

monster_hunter.title: Monster Hunter
monster_hunter.description: +20% XP from hostile mobs. Every kill teaches a lesson.

cobblemon_whisperer.title: Cobblemon Whisperer
cobblemon_whisperer.description: +15% Cobblemon catch rate. Wild creatures sense your kinship.

dimensional_traveler.title: Dimensional Traveler
dimensional_traveler.description: -20% portal cooldown. Dimensions bend to your will.

star_chart.title: Star Chart
star_chart.description: +25% space travel speed. The stars are your roadmap.

master_explorer.title: Master Explorer
master_explorer.description: +30% structure loot quality. Ruins reveal their finest treasures to you.

cosmic_awareness.title: Cosmic Awareness
cosmic_awareness.description: Detect rare mob spawns and structures within 128 blocks.

eternal_walker.title: Eternal Walker
eternal_walker.description: All exploration stats +10%. The world has no secrets from you.
